title: Seal for container, and related systems and methods
abstract: A device for releasably sealing a cavity in a chamber of a container includes a seal having a body that is deformable, and a mechanism operable to deform the seal's body into a first shape and into a second shape. The seal's body has a region sized and configured such that when the region contacts a surface of a container, a fluid, such as air, is prevented from moving between the region of the seal's body and the surface that the region contacts. In the first shape, the region of the seal's body contacts the container's surface and prevents fluid from moving between the region of the seal's body and the container's surface. In the second shape, the region of the seal's body does not contact the container's surface and allows fluid to move between the region of the seal's body and the container's surface.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A device for releasably sealing a cavity in a chamber of a container, the device comprising: a seal having a body that is deformable, the body having a region sized and configured such that when the region contacts a surface of a container, fluid is prevented from moving between the region of the seal芒聙聶s body and the surface that the region contacts, and a mechanism operable to deform the seal芒聙聶s body into: a first shape that, when the seal芒聙聶s body is positioned adjacent a surface of a container and the seal芒聙聶s body is deformed into the first shape, then the region of the seal芒聙聶s body contacts the container芒聙聶s surface and prevents fluid from moving between the region of the seal芒聙聶s body and the container芒聙聶s surface, and a second shape that, when the seal芒聙聶s body is in the same position adjacent the surface of the container and the seal芒聙聶s body is deformed into the second shape, then the region of the seal芒聙聶s body does not contact the container芒聙聶s surface and allows fluid to move between the region of the seal芒聙聶s body and the container芒聙聶s surface. 2. The device of claim 1 wherein the seal芒聙聶s body is in the shape of an annulus. 3. The device of claim 1 wherein: the seal芒聙聶s body is in the shape of an annulus and includes an outside surface defining a perimeter, and the body芒聙聶s region is located on the outside surface and extends the length of the body芒聙聶s perimeter. 4. The device of claim 1 wherein: the seal芒聙聶s body is in the shape of an annulus, and includes a longitudinal axis, a first end, a second end, and a band that extends between the two ends, 

 wherein the band is curved such that the radial distance from the longitudinal axis to the band increases as the band extends away from the body芒聙聶s first end, and as the band extends away from the body芒聙聶s second end, and the body芒聙聶s region is located on the portion of the band whose radial distance from the longitudinal axis is the greatest. 5. The device of claim 1 wherein the seal芒聙聶s body includes silicone. 6. The device of claim 1 wherein the mechanism includes: a first plate that contacts a first end of the seal芒聙聶s body, a second plate that contacts a second end of the seal芒聙聶s body, and wherein: the first plate is located a first distance away from the second plate when the mechanism deforms the seal芒聙聶s body into the first shape, the first plate is located a second distance away from the second plate when the mechanism deforms the seal芒聙聶s body into the second shape, and the first distance is shorter than the second distance. 7. The device of claim 6 wherein: the seal芒聙聶s body is in the shape of an annulus, and includes a longitudinal axis, a perimeter, a first end, a second end, and a band that extends between the two ends, the first plate includes a first skirt disposed inside the perimeter of the seal芒聙聶s body and extending toward the second plate, wherein the first skirt prevents the band of the seal芒聙聶s body from deforming toward the longitudinal axis when the mechanism deforms the seal芒聙聶s body into the first shape, and 

 the second plate includes a second skirt disposed inside the perimeter of the seal芒聙聶s body and extending toward the first plate, wherein the second skirt also prevents the band of the seal芒聙聶s body from deforming toward the longitudinal axis when the mechanism deforms the seal芒聙聶s body into the first shape. 8. The device of claim 6 wherein: the first plate includes a receiver, the second plate includes a post sized and configured to slide inside and relative to the receiver to keep the first and second plates aligned as the first plate moves toward the second plate. 9. The device of claim 6 wherein the mechanism includes a cam that contacts the first plate and rotates relative to the first plate to move the first plate toward the second plate. 10. A method for sealing a cavity inside a chamber of a container, the method comprising: positioning a device inside a chamber of a container such that a region of a seal of the device lies adjacent a surface of a wall of the container that defines the chamber; deforming a body of the seal to urge the seal芒聙聶s region into contact with the wall芒聙聶s surface; and contacting the wall芒聙聶s surface with the region of the device芒聙聶s seal to form a cavity within the container芒聙聶s chamber and prevent fluid from moving into and out of the cavity between the region of the device芒聙聶s seal and the surface of the container芒聙聶s wall. 11. The method of claim 10 wherein positioning the device inside the chamber of the container includes locating the device near the container芒聙聶s mouth. 12. The method of claim 10 wherein positioning the device inside the chamber of the container includes locating the device near the container芒聙聶s bottom, away from the container芒聙聶s mouth. 13. The method of claim 10 wherein deforming the seal芒聙聶s body includes increasing an outside diameter of a band of the seal芒聙聶s body. 14. The method of claim 10 wherein deforming the seal芒聙聶s body includes squeezing a band of the seal芒聙聶s body to increase an outside diameter of the band. 15. The method of claim 14 wherein deforming the seal芒聙聶s body includes pushing a first plate of a mechanism of the device against a first end of the band and toward a second end of the band. 16. The method of claim 10 wherein contacting the wall芒聙聶s surface with the region of the device芒聙聶s seal includes contacting a single, continuous section of the wall芒聙聶s surface that forms a ring around the container芒聙聶s chamber, to isolate the cavity from the outside environment. 17. The method of claim 10 further comprising deforming the body of the seal to urge the seal芒聙聶s region away from the wall芒聙聶s surface. 18. The method of claim 10 further comprising: deforming the body of the seal to urge the seal芒聙聶s region away from the wall芒聙聶s surface, and withdrawing the device out of the container芒聙聶s chamber. 19. The method of claim 10 further comprising: deforming the body of the seal to urge the seal芒聙聶s region away from the wall芒聙聶s surface, and re-positioning the device inside the chamber of the container such that the region of the device芒聙聶s seal lies adjacent the surface of the container芒聙聶s wall at a different location; 

 deforming the body of the seal to urge the seal芒聙聶s region into contact with the wall芒聙聶s surface; and contacting the wall芒聙聶s surface with the region of the device芒聙聶s seal to form another cavity within the container芒聙聶s chamber and prevent fluid from moving into and out of the cavity between the region of the device芒聙聶s seal and the surface of the container芒聙聶s wall. 20. A container comprising: a chamber defined by a surface of a wall that is operable to hold an item that is disposed inside the chamber; and a device operable to form a cavity inside the chamber and releasably seal the cavity such that the cavity is isolated from the outside environment, the device comprising: a seal having a body that is deformable, the body having a region sized and configured to prevent fluid from moving, into and out of the cavity, between the region of the seal芒聙聶s body and the wall芒聙聶s surface, when the region contacts the wall芒聙聶s surface, and a mechanism operable to deform the seal芒聙聶s body into: a first shape that, when the device is positioned in the chamber and the seal芒聙聶s body is deformed into the first shape, then the region of the seal芒聙聶s body contacts the wall芒聙聶s surface, and a second shape that, when the device is identically positioned in the chamber and the seal芒聙聶s body is deformed into the second shape, then the region of the seal芒聙聶s body does not contact the wall芒聙聶s surface. 21. The cannister of claim 21 wherein the chamber is cylindrical. 22. The cannister of claim 21 wherein the chamber has a longitudinal axis and the device is positionable at first position along the longitudinal axis to form a cavity 

 that has a volume less than the volume of the chamber, and at a second position along the longitudinal axis to form another cavity that has a volume different than the volume of the cavity formed by the device at the fist position.
